description_long: This is a large, stately museum building with a symmetrical U-shaped layout, featuring a central main structure flanked by two perpendicular wings. The exterior walls are painted a light cream color, and the roof is a distinctive green metal, punctuated by several white chimneys. The main facade is adorned with tall, arched windows and a prominent central entrance, highlighted by decorative columns and a small balcony above. The rear of the building includes a rounded extension, likely serving as an additional gallery or rotunda. The structure sits on a flat, gray base, suggesting a paved courtyard or plaza surrounding the museum.
description: A grand, cream-colored museum with a green metal roof, U-shaped layout, and ornate central entrance, set on a paved base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, arched windows, and decorative columns on the central facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the wings and the green roof's angular geometry.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded extension and the symmetry of the building's wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, emphasizing the building's length and the arrangement of the wings.
